title: waylandcraft
body:
This mod adds the functionality of an entire fully featured Wayland Compositor in Minecraft! Launch apps and open windows completely within your Minecraft world. Drag and drop data from one window to another. Pin a video player to your hud. The choice is yours.

**IMPORTANT**: This mod only supports **Linux**!
You can install it on MacOS and Windows but you won't have any of the features.

Also note: waylandcraft is client-side only (only you can see your own windows) but servers may install it to allow players to have their window items on the server.

For more information and common issue fixes check out the [Github](https://github.com/EVV1E/waylandcraft)!

![Screenshot in-game of a variety of open windows including Firefox, GIMP and VLC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17f57f2a435eff170adf0a67eabcf4ee8742529e.jpeg)
